narration: Your phone battery works by shuttling lithium ions between two electrodes.
visual_description: Hook visual: Your phone battery works by shuttling lithium ions between two electrodes.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Your phone battery works by shuttling lithium ions between two electrodes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Your phone battery works by shuttling lithium ions between two electrodes.

narration: When charging, lithium ions move from the positive electrode to the negative one.
visual_description: Context visual: When charging, lithium ions move from the positive electrode to the negative one.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: When charging, lithium ions move from the positive electrode to the negative one.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: When charging, lithium ions move from the positive electrode to the negative one.

narration: Discharging? The process flips! Ions travel back to release energy.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Discharging? The process flips! Ions travel back to release energy.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Discharging? The process flips! Ions travel back to release energy.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Discharging? The process flips! Ions travel back to release energy.

narration: This movement creates a flow of electrons, powering your device!
visual_description: Evidence visual: This movement creates a flow of electrons, powering your device!
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This movement creates a flow of electrons, powering your device!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This movement creates a flow of electrons, powering your device!

narration: So, next time you charge, remember those tiny ions at work.
visual_description: Payoff visual: So, next time you charge, remember those tiny ions at work.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: So, next time you charge, remember those tiny ions at work.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: So, next time you charge, remember those tiny ions at work.
